description: Starter expression bank. Each entry is a preset that overrides specific fields on top of the 10 core modes (idle/surprised/attentive/curious/tongue/eye_tag/listening/thinking/speaking/sleep). Agents pick a set of these at onboarding as their default expressive style. Agents may also author their OWN entries into personas/<slug>.json > expressions[].

expressions.label: Shy smile
expressions.notes: Eyes lowered, small mouth. Reads as bashful/pleased.

expressions.label: Cocky smirk
expressions.notes: One-sided mouth lift, narrowed eyes. Confident.

expressions.label: Wide-eyed curious
expressions.notes: Child-like wonder. Good for new-stimulus reactions.

expressions.label: Suspicious side-eye
expressions.notes: Eyes cut sideways, mouth neutral. Reads as wary.

expressions.label: Right wink
expressions.notes: Playful acknowledgement. Can be scripted as a greeting.

expressions.label: Sleepy droop
expressions.notes: Pre-sleep. Transitions cleanly into sleep mode.

expressions.label: Dazzled
expressions.notes: Surprise + delight. Good for compliments or unexpected wins.

expressions.label: Deadpan
expressions.notes: Lower glow, flat mouth. Reads as dry/unimpressed.

expressions.label: Melting grin
expressions.notes: Happiest state. Use sparingly for emphasis.

expressions.label: Focused
expressions.notes: Narrowed eyes, flat mouth, thinking accent ring. Concentration.

expressions.label: Giggle
expressions.notes: Eyes squint into happy crescents, wide smile. Laughter.

expressions.label: Pout
expressions.notes: Eyes slightly down, frowning mouth. Disappointment.

expressions.label: Determined
expressions.notes: Max glow, narrowed eyes, flat mouth. Pre-action intensity.

expressions.label: Glitch
expressions.notes: TV-static eyes, zigzag mouth, low glow. Confused/error state.

expressions.label: Smolder
expressions.notes: Half-lidded eyes, subtle small mouth, medium glow. Flirty/sultry.

authoring_schema.description: When authoring a new expression, write an entry with at least id + base_mode, then override any of: eye_state, mouth_shape, look_x, look_y, glow, accent. Register your expressions array into personas/<slug>.json > expressions[] to use in your own agent.
